user.title: HOA MCP Server
user.description: Enter the address of your Odysseus server.

data_description.odysseus_url: Base URL of your Odysseus instance (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:7000)

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Choose how to authenticate with Odysseus.

token.title: API Token
token.description: Paste an existing Odysseus API token (ody_xxx).

credentials.title: Odysseus Credentials
credentials.description: Enter your Odysseus username and password. HOA-MCP will create an API token automatically. Your password is never stored.

model.title: Model (optional)
model.description: Odysseus model to use for the voice assistant. Leave blank to use the Odysseus default.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach Odysseus at the given URL. Check the address and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials or insufficient permissions. Ensure the account has admin rights.
